front.title: DHCP New Option Extension based on LLM Capability

abstract.t: This document specifies a DHCP option extension designed for campus networks to help client devices distinguish and connect to a master device with the LLM (Large Language Model). The mechanism extends a new DHCP option containing two specific parameters within the DHCP payload: the master device's LLM address and the master device's LLM configuration. This allows client devices to identify and register to LLM-enabled master device during the bootstrap phase.
